emails.body: Any idea how I should handle this? Forwarded by Mark Taylor/HOU/ECT on 03/01/2001 11:22 AM Cheryl Nelson@ENRON Sent by: Keegan Farrell@ENRON 03/01/2001 11:03 AM

emails.subject: Re: Remote Access Request
emails.body: Re: Remote Access Request Mark: Cheryl would have access through IPass. Have her talk to our floor tech so he can explain how it works. Janette Elbertson Enron North America Corp. Legal Department EB3326 Telephone: (713) 853-7906 Fax: (713) 646-2600 janette.elbertson@enron.com Mark Taylor 03/01/2001 11:22 AM
